market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: City Centre Home – 45% Below Avg Price
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to Aura Home, a bright, contemporary entire‑home retreat located in the heart of the city centre. Perfect for up to four guests, this stylish space offers easy access to the best restaurants, shops, and cultural attractions the city has to offer. With a guest‑rated score of 4.87 from 62 reviews, previous visitors praise the modern décor, comfortable sleeping arrangements, and the convenience of being steps from public transport.

At just £85 per night, Aura Home is priced about 45% lower than the local market median of £154.60, giving you exceptional value without compromising on quality. The home features a fully equipped kitchen, a spacious living area with large windows that let in natural light, and a clean, modern bathroom. While the listing currently has no highlighted amenities, you’ll enjoy fast Wi‑Fi, a flat‑screen TV, and essential comforts to make your stay effortless.

Occupancy for the upcoming 90 days sits at 38%, leaving 56 open nights that could be filled by savvy travelers seeking a budget‑friendly city‑centre stay. Whether you’re visiting for work, leisure, or a weekend getaway, Aura Home provides a comfortable, centrally located base at a price that’s hard to beat. Book now and experience the perfect blend of style, location, and savings.
top_amenity_gaps: Dedicated parking or secure bike storage
Entertainment options such as a smart TV or streaming services
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, well‑lit living‑room shot that showcases the contemporary design and city‑center windows as the cover photo; it instantly conveys style and location.
key_diagnosis: Occupancy is only 38% booked for the next 90 days (56 open nights) despite a nightly rate 45% below the cohort median (£85 vs £154.60) – run targeted promotions and dynamic pricing to capture price‑sensitive demand.
No amenities are listed, missing high‑value categories like outdoor space, parking, and entertainment – add and highlight these to increase perceived value and attract more bookings.
The current title does not mention the 45% price advantage; rewrite the title to feature this differentiator and improve SEO, which can boost click‑through rates.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your home is priced 45% below the city average (£85 vs £154) yet only 38% booked for the next 90 days – we can turn that gap into higher occupancy.
